design_plan: Python RNG Execution: seed derived from title + niche_landing + recruiters + 2026-07-06T06:28:37Z. Selected architecture: workflow-command-center. AIDA Check: Hero (Attention) → Proof & market context (Interest) → Workflow + media (Desire) → CTA band (Action). Font Selection: Cabinet Grotesk primary with system fallbacks. Hero Math Verification: max-width 1120px, clamp sizing ensures 2–3 lines at desktop. Bento Density Verification: grid-auto-flow: dense present in .bento and .compare-grid. GSAP Motion Selection: card-stacking + hover-physics with motion guards. Label Sweep & Button Check: black pill primary CTA, white secondary CTA verified for contrast.
headline: Super for recruiters sourcing candidates and coordinating interviews

site_brief.audience: recruiters sourcing candidates and coordinating interviews
site_brief.goal: Create a conversion-focused landing page for this audience. Tie current market evidence to pain points, then show how Super can operate apps and reuse a computer-use cache for repeated work. Include a long-form field guide for this niche with concrete workflows, how-to steps, role-specific examples, objections, and a setup checklist.
queries: recruiters sourcing candidates and coordinating interviews AI assistant
recruiters sourcing candidates and coordinating interviews personal AI agent
site_brief.title: Super for recruiters sourcing candidates and coordinating interviews

summary: A conversion‑focused niche landing page for recruiters who source candidates across multiple platforms and coordinate high‑volume interviews. The page positions Super as a sharper alternative for repeated, real computer‑use workflows by emphasizing its personal AI agents and reusable computer-use cache, with a deep field guide tailored to recruiter operations.
